title: tabernaemontana letestui
intro: Tabernaemontana letestui, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is commonly known as the "Gabon olive" or "Gaboon olive." This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana letestui include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Tabernaemontana letestui include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
